# Motivation-Letter Golden Fixtures

These fixtures are binding regression cases for the motivation-letter creator.

- `admin-sachbearbeiter-fk-golden.json`: primary visual and content golden case with visible reference.
- `transgourmet-junior-digital-marketing-manager.json`: direct marketing fit with hidden reference and honest BSI gap.
- `transgourmet-approved-copy.md`: approved human-readable copy for the Transgourmet live test.

The renderer must use `../APPROVED_GOLDEN_STANDARD.md` and `../layout-reference.json`. The fixtures do not define an alternative layout.
